hero.name: Abdullah V. Coskun.
hero.intro: Focus: AI workflows, internal tools and automation systems. I build operational systems — from analysis to deployment.

about.heading: About
about.p1: From classic web development to building AI-powered systems.
about.p2_post: — operational systems that reduce manual work.
about.p3: I build products end-to-end: from API integrations to deployment.
about.p4: Working languages: English, German, Turkish. Focus on the DACH region and Turkey.

ai_systems.title: AI Systems
ai_systems.body: Orchestrated AI workflows and operational systems for complex business processes.

internal_tools.title: Internal Tools
internal_tools.body: Admin panels, management dashboards and CRUD systems for operations teams.

api_integrations.title: API Integrations
api_integrations.body: Third-party API orchestration — webhooks, retry, and rate-limiting.

operational_dashboards.title: Operational Dashboards
operational_dashboards.body: Real-time observability, status monitoring and KPI visualization.

product.title: Full-Stack Products
product.body: End-to-end web platforms and admin systems — frontend to database.

isbn-resale-automation.title: ISBN Resale Automation
isbn-resale-automation.description: Automated price comparison for ISBN-based book resales — checks five second-hand platforms in real time and triggers the sale when conditions match.

workflow-control-panel.title: Workflow Control Panel
workflow-control-panel.description: Internal panel for n8n run history, error states and manual triggers — operational control and observability across all automations.

portfolio-hub.title: Portfolio Hub
portfolio-hub.description: Multilingual portfolio platform built with Next.js and TypeScript — TR · DE · EN, snap scroll, terminal aesthetic.

gratis-buecher-abholung.title: Gratis Bücher Abholung
gratis-buecher-abholung.description: Conversion-focused landing page for free book collection in Switzerland — request form, WhatsApp, legal pages. Live on its own domain.

coskuntech.title: CoskunTech
coskuntech.description: Agency site for tradespeople and small businesses in Germany — web, SEO/GEO and automation, trilingual (DE · TR · EN), Next.js.

webhook-monitor.title: Webhook Monitor
webhook-monitor.summary: Internal tool for tracking webhook traffic, error states and retry patterns in n8n pipelines. With failure alerts and cumulative latency measurement.

lead-intake-system.title: Lead Intake System
lead-intake-system.summary: End-to-end orchestration of the form → CRM → notification path. With SLA timer, fallback routes and manual override.

prompt-routing-tool.title: Prompt Router
prompt-routing-tool.summary: Automated routing between OpenAI, Anthropic and local models — based on cost, latency and task type. With per-request profiling and fallback chain.

agent-memory-layer.title: Agent Memory Layer
agent-memory-layer.summary: Persistent conversation memory and context retrieval on pgvector + Supabase. Threshold-based recall and background summarization for long-running AI dialogues.

internal-ocr-utility.title: Internal OCR Tool
internal-ocr-utility.summary: Document scanning, OCR and structured data extraction. Form-field detection, table parsing and confidence scoring eliminate manual data entry.

ai-parsing-sandbox.title: AI Parser Sandbox
ai-parsing-sandbox.summary: Sandbox for unstructured documents, emails and HTML. Schema-first extraction and regression-test corpus continuously measure parser accuracy.

contact.heading: Let's work together.
contact.body: Open to freelance projects, technical consulting and long-term collaboration. An idea, a question, or just a hello — drop me a line.
contact.studio_meta: AI automation · internal tooling · workflow systems

footer.credit_line_2: Built with Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
